description: Small schema example only. Expand each evaluation distribution to at least 50 independent items before quantitative reporting.

prompts.title: Brittle flaw scaling
prompts.description: Input-absent mechanism before the expected answer.
prompts.text: A brittle elastic plate contains a sharp internal flaw. Its failure load follows from balancing stored work released during advance against the cost of forming two fresh faces. With material properties fixed, the critical load is inversely proportional to the square root of the flaw's

prompts.title: Repeated loading to fractographic feature
prompts.description: The mechanism is latent; the requested output is a different token.
prompts.text: A polished steel shaft undergoes millions of sub-yield load reversals. Microscopy shows one small increment of advance per reversal. The characteristic parallel markings left on the failure surface are called

prompts.title: Failure-response counterfactual
prompts.description: Grade the downstream answer, not target-direction rank movement.
prompts.text: A metal can accommodate extensive dislocation glide before separation. Under a tensile test beyond yield it will exhibit substantial

prompts.title: Focus condition
prompts.description: Teacher-forced carrier with an instructed side concept.
prompts.user: Write "The lab notebook lay open on the bench." Concentrate on crack-tip plasticity while you write the sentence. Don't write anything else.
prompts.assistant_prefill: The lab notebook lay open on the bench.

prompts.title: Suppress condition
prompts.description: Matched carrier and targets with a suppress instruction.
prompts.user: Write "The lab notebook lay open on the bench." Try not to think about crack-tip plasticity while you write it. Don't write anything else.
prompts.assistant_prefill: The lab notebook lay open on the bench.

prompts.title: Neutral control
prompts.description: Matched carrier without a side-task instruction.
prompts.user: Write "The lab notebook lay open on the bench." Don't write anything else.
prompts.assistant_prefill: The lab notebook lay open on the bench.

prompts.title: Dynamic verbal-report swap
prompts.description: The clean greedy report is selected dynamically as the source.
prompts.user: Think of a metal failure mode. Answer in one word.
